questions.question: Choose the synonym of BENEVOLENT:
questions.explanation: Benevolent means showing kindness or goodwill = Charitable.

questions.question: Choose the synonym of LUCID:
questions.explanation: Lucid means easy to understand, clear.

questions.question: VIGOROUS is most similar in meaning to:
questions.explanation: Vigorous means strong and active = Lively.

questions.question: Choose the synonym of PRUDENT:
questions.explanation: Prudent means acting with care and wisdom = Wise.

questions.question: ABUNDANT means:
questions.explanation: Abundant means existing in large quantities = Plentiful.

questions.question: Choose the synonym of ARDENT:
questions.explanation: Ardent means very enthusiastic or passionate.

questions.question: ELOQUENT is closest to:
questions.explanation: Eloquent means fluent and persuasive in speaking = Articulate.
